violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the (cafeteria ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the (kitchen). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
Hand Washing sink near dishwasher is lacking hot water. Temperature observed at 60DF. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
The (ceiling tile ) in the (mop room ) area is in poor repair. Observed missing tile. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
Inspector observed handsink next to 3 bay sink in poor repair (no running water). Per interview with staff, they use the handsink next to dishwasher area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Cold food items (deli meat sandwiches and deli meat salads) were observed between 47-49F at receiving. PIC called supervisor and placed items in cooler for active cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was 3610 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for lactic acid sanitizer between 740-1875 ppm. PIC added water to solution. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
2 door freezer located in the kitchen area was not in good repair (heavy thick ice accumulation). New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
Inspector observed the hot water at 65F at handwashing sink near dishwasher. New Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025

Inspector observed the following in poor repair: - leak under 3 bay sink (middle compartment) - leak under handwashing sink (near dishwasher) - leak at faucet of handwashing sink (near dishwasher) - leak under dishwasher Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/17/2025
Inspector observed a very strong oder coming from grease trap receptacles in kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The ceiling tile in the mop sink area is in poor repair (missing). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/03/2025
Observed a leakage at plumbing under 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The floors in back storage area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025
